description: NASDAQ lost 78% peak to trough. Tech/internet valuations collapsed. Massive layoffs in tech sector.
Markets closed 4 days. Airlines grounded. Travel sector devastated. Defence spending surged.
Markets volatile on invasion. Oil spike then retreat. Defence stocks surged.
Low rates drove housing speculation. Mortgage-backed securities proliferated. Risk building.
S&P lost 56.8%. Banks collapsed. Lehman Brothers failed Sep 2008. Credit markets froze. Unemployment hit 10%.
QE1 and QE2 drove recovery. Banks recapitalised. Tech leadership emerging.
BP shares halved. Gulf coast tourism devastated. Environmental regulation tightened.
S&P downgraded US AAA rating. Market fell 17% in 2 weeks. European debt crisis concurrent.
Oil fell from $115 to $26. Shale producers bankrupted. Energy sector devastated. Airlines benefited.
Crimea annexation 2014 then full invasion 2022. Energy prices spiked. European exposure.
Chinese market fell 40%. Commodity demand fears. Global growth concerns.
UK voted to leave EU. GBP crashed 10%. UK and European stocks fell. Safe havens surged.
Trump tariffs on Chinese goods. Tech supply chains disrupted. S&P fell 20% Q4 2018.
Fed reversed rate hikes. Phase 1 trade deal. Markets recovered strongly. New highs.
Fastest bear market in history. S&P fell 34% in 33 days. Lockdowns worldwide. Oil went negative.
Unprecedented fiscal and monetary stimulus. WFH boom. Tech valuations surged. Retail investor surge.
GameStop, AMC short squeezes. Retail investors vs hedge funds. Robinhood halted trading.
Inflation hit 9%. Fed hiked rates from 0 to 5.25%. Growth stocks crushed. NASDAQ fell 33%.
Full invasion. Gas prices surged in Europe. Wheat spiked. NATO defence spending commitments rose.
Russia cut gas supplies. European energy prices surged 10x. Industrial production threatened.
SVB collapsed. Signature Bank failed. Credit Suisse rescued. Contagion fears. Fed backstopped deposits.
ChatGPT launch Jan 2023. Nvidia surged 800%. AI infrastructure buildout. Power demand surge.
Hamas attack. Iran-Israel tensions. Shipping through Red Sea disrupted. Houthi attacks on vessels.
60+ countries held elections. US election Nov 2024. Policy uncertainty across sectors.
Sweeping tariffs announced. Largest 2-day loss in history - $6.6 trillion. China retaliated 34%.
90-day pause announced. Markets partially recovered. Trade negotiations ongoing.
